title: How I cracked my first SDE Internship at a Product Company
author: Arjun Sharma
excerpt: After 6 months of consistent practice and 3 failed attempts, I finally got an offer from a top product company. Here's exactly what worked for me.

title: Dynamic Programming Patterns Every Coder Should Know
author: Priya Nair
excerpt: DP seems hard until you recognize the pattern. I've broken down the top 7 DP patterns with examples that will change how you approach these problems.

title: A Beginner's Guide to Competitive Programming at RIT
author: Rohan Kulkarni
excerpt: Just starting out with Codeforces and CodeChef? I share my journey from Div. 4 to Div. 2 and the resources that helped me the most.

title: Building a Full-Stack Project That Impressed Interviewers
author: Ananya Desai
excerpt: Not just another todo app. I built a project that solved a real problem and walked interviewers through my thought process step by step.
